'''tadhuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabuki|kabuki]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabuki|kabuki]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tadhuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædhihith|tædhihith]] || [[word:tædhihij|tædhihij]] || [[word:tædhihish|tædhihish]] || [[word:tædhihi|tædhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhudhuhuth|tadhudhuhuth]] || [[word:tadhudhuhuj|tadhudhuhuj]] || [[word:tadhudhuhush|tadhudhuhush]] || [[word:tadhudhuhu|tadhudhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhuhuth|tadhuhuth]] || [[word:tadhuhuj|tadhuhuj]] || [[word:tadhuhush|tadhuhush]] || [[word:tadhuhu|tadhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhufhufth|tadhufhufth]] || [[word:tadhufhufj|tadhufhufj]] || [[word:tadhufhufsh|tadhufhufsh]] || [[word:tadhufhuf|tadhufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhuhuthu|tadhuhuthu]] || [[word:tadhuhuju|tadhuhuju]] || [[word:tadhuhushu|tadhuhushu]] || [[word:tadhuhuku|tadhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhuhuth|tadhuhuth]] || [[word:tadhuhuj|tadhuhuj]] || [[word:tadhuhush|tadhuhush]] || [[word:tadhuhu|tadhuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhuhuthul|tadhuhuthul]] || [[word:tadhuhujul|tadhuhujul]] || [[word:tadhuhushul|tadhuhushul]] || [[word:tadhuhukul|tadhuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhuhuuthuthu|tadhuhuuthuthu]] || [[word:tadhuhuujuju|tadhuhuujuju]] || [[word:tadhuhuushushu|tadhuhuushushu]] || [[word:tadhuhuuku|tadhuhuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhuhuthun|tadhuhuthun]] || [[word:tadhuhujun|tadhuhujun]] || [[word:tadhuhushun|tadhuhushun]] || [[word:tadhuhukun|tadhuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhuhuthuoro|tadhuhuthuoro]] || [[word:tadhuhujuoro|tadhuhujuoro]] || [[word:tadhuhushuoro|tadhuhushuoro]] || [[word:tadhuhukuoro|tadhuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
